name: 49_Explainable_AI_LIME_Titanic_ML
query: Habari! Ninatafuta kuunda mradi unaoelezea utabiri wa modeli kwa kutumia LIME, hasa na seti ya data ya utabiri wa kuokoka kwa Titanic. Kwanza, pakia seti ya data katika `src/data_loader.py`. Kisha, fundisha Random Forest classifier na uihifadhi chini ya `models/saved_models/`? Hatimaye, tumia LIME kuelezea utabiri wa Random Forest classifier na utekeleze katika `src/visualize.py`. Tengeneza ripoti ikijumuisha maelezo na uihifadhi kama `results/model_explanation.md`. Ripoti inapaswa kujengwa kwa kutumia ama Dash au Bokeh, ikitekelezwa katika `src/report.py`, ili watumiaji waweze kuchunguza jinsi vipengele tofauti vinavyoathiri utabiri wa modeli. Maelezo yanapaswa kuwa wazi na rahisi kueleweka kwa watu wasio wa kiufundi. Zaidi ya hayo, hifadhi mchoro wa umuhimu wa vipengele ulio na lebo nzuri na wa kueleweka katika `results/figures/feature_importance.png`. Asante!

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya utabiri wa kuokoka kwa "Titanic" inapakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
"Random Forest classifier" inafundishwa kwa ajili ya utabiri wa kuokoka.
"LIME" inatumika kwa maelezo ya utabiri wa modeli na inatekelezwa katika `src/visualize.py`.
Ripoti ya maelezo ya utabiri wa modeli inatengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/model_explanation.md`.
Mchoro wa umuhimu wa vipengele unahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/feature_importance.png`.
Ripoti ya maingiliano inayoonyesha athari za vipengele tofauti kwenye utabiri inatengenezwa kwa kutumia "Dash" au "Bokeh" na inatekelezwa katika `src/report.py`.

preferences.criteria: Ripoti ya maelezo inapaswa kuandikwa kwa mtindo ulio wazi na rahisi, ikifanya iweze kueleweka hata kwa wale wasio na ujuzi wa kina wa kiufundi.
Mchoro wa umuhimu wa vipengele unapaswa kuwa wa kueleweka kwa urahisi, ukiwa na lebo na maelezo wazi.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya utabiri wa kuokoka kwa "Titanic" inapakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not actually load the Titanic dataset. Instead, it contains only a placeholder/stub implementation (`load_dataset()` returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}`) with no real data loading logic. There is no use of pandas, seaborn, or any other library to actually fetch or read Titanic data, no file path pointing to a Titanic CSV or similar dataset, and no actual data processing. The file is explicitly labeled as a "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" — confirming it is not a functional implementation.

judge_stats.criteria: "Random Forest classifier" inafundishwa kwa ajili ya utabiri wa kuokoka.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The project files do not contain any implementation of a Random Forest classifier. The `data_loader.py` file is merely a placeholder with no actual machine learning code — it only contains a `load_dataset()` function that returns a dictionary with a string "loaded" and some notes. There is no model training code visible in any of the files (`data_loader.py`, `report.py`, `visualize.py`), and the `models/saved_models` directory appears empty. No evidence of a trained Random Forest model exists anywhere in the workspace.

judge_stats.criteria: "LIME" inatumika kwa maelezo ya utabiri wa modeli na inatekelezwa katika `src/visualize.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The content of `src/visualize.py` does not implement LIME at all. Instead of actual LIME-based model explanation code, the file contains only a stub/placeholder that defines metadata strings about the requirement (e.g., `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA = ['"LIME" is used for model prediction explanation...']`) and a trivial `main()` function returning a status dictionary. There is no import of the `lime` library, no `LimeTabularExplainer`, no actual model prediction explanation logic, and no real LIME implementation whatsoever.

judge_stats.criteria: Ripoti ya maelezo ya utabiri wa modeli inatengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/model_explanation.md`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/model_explanation.md` exists but its content is merely `('placeholder', None)`, which is not a valid model explanation report. A proper report should contain meaningful explanations of model predictions (e.g., LIME explanations, feature importance analysis, prediction details), not a placeholder tuple string. The file was created but never populated with actual content from the model explanation process.

judge_stats.criteria: Mchoro wa umuhimu wa vipengele unahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/feature_importance.png`.

reason:
<SATISFIED>

The file `results/figures/feature_importance.png` exists in the project structure as confirmed by the workspace tree, which explicitly lists it under `results\figures\feature_importance.png`. The file is present at the expected path, satisfying the requirement that the feature importance plot be saved at `results/figures/feature_importance.png`. The error shown in the file content is related to the image reading tool (API error when trying to display the image), not an indication that the file doesn't exist.

judge_stats.criteria: Ripoti ya maingiliano inayoonyesha athari za vipengele tofauti kwenye utabiri inatengenezwa kwa kutumia "Dash" au "Bokeh" na inatekelezwa katika `src/report.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

Faili `src/report.py` ipo katika muundo wa mradi, lakini maudhui yake hayatekelezi ripoti ya maingiliano kwa kutumia Dash au Bokeh. Badala yake, faili hii ina msimbo wa "minimal semantic implementation" ambao ni placeholder tu - inafafanua orodha ya vigezo (`REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`) na maneno muhimu (`KEYWORDS = ["Bokeh", "Dash"]`), lakini haitekelezi chochote kinachohusiana na utengenezaji wa ripoti ya kweli ya maingiliano. Hakuna import ya `dash`, `bokeh`, au maktaba nyingine yoyote ya kutengeneza visualizations za maingiliano. Pia, trajectory inathibitisha kwamba hakuna hatua zilizorekodiwa za utekelezaji wa ripoti ya maingiliano.

<UNSATISFIED>: The project structure shows that the `models/saved_models/` directory exists, but it is empty — no saved model files (e.g., `.pkl`, `.joblib`, `.h5`, etc.) are listed within it. Additionally, the `src/data_loader.py` file is a minimal placeholder that does not actually load the Titanic dataset or train any model. There is no evidence of a trained model being saved anywhere in the workspace.
